description: R3a-1 combined-graph + SCC goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Each <fixture>.r3a1.golden.json is the ALLOWLISTED projection of the L4 graph substrate, captured POST-buildCombinedGraph / POST-tarjanScc / PRE-computeSummaries (`indexWorkspace` → `resolveModel` ONCE → `buildCombinedGraph` → `tarjanScc`; the dump NEVER runs computeSummaries or the dep hooks). Per fixture: combinedEdges (sorted CombinedEdge[] in al-sem emission order) + uncertaintyEdges (sorted UncertaintyEdge[]) + typedEdges (model.typedEdges/GraphEdge[], display anchors dropped) + sccs (the reverse-topological SCC condensation; members sorted; recursive flag). All ids in stable form (StableRoutineId / StableObjectId / StableTableId / StableEventId / stable callsiteId / operationId). See scripts/r3a1-projection.ts.
note: R3a-1 is the GRAPH + SCC ONLY. EXCLUDED (later gates): RoutineSummary (dbEffects/uncertainties/parameterRoles/capabilityFacts*/coverage — R3a-2/3), the dep hooks (injectIntraAppCallEdges/collectCitedDepEvidence/collectDepOrderIndex — R3a-4), full cross-app (R3a-5). Source-only: .app-bearing fixtures are EXCLUDED (their dep edges enter typedEdges in R3a-4). Display SourceAnchors are dropped from typedEdges (reconstructed at the R3a-2+ witness layer). The SCC list order is reverse-topological (callees before callers) and POSITIONAL — part of the comparison surface.

exclusions.reason: empty model (0 objects/0 routines) — fail-closed single-app provider; not source-only-analyzable
